attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks (17-29km to go) on climbs, often after team pacing ends or when isolated. Prefers decisive moves before final climb rather than summit duels, maximizing time trial power on extended efforts.
team_tactics: Frequently isolated early or deliberately surrenders defensive duties; team sets early tempo then leaves him to solo attacks. Vulnerability when team tactics backfire (Catalunya circuit racing) or when positioned poorly in dangerous conditions.
terrain_preference: Dominates time trials (flat and medium-mountain) and extreme gradient climbs (24%+). Struggles on sustained long mountain passes (Albula, Aubisque collapses) and technical descents where pure power advantage disappears.
vulnerability: Wilts under sustained high-pace followed by accelerations (dropped by Roglic/Jumbo tempo). Accumulated fatigue in week-3 Grand Tours. Shows mental frustration when tactics fail or conditions are uncontrollable. Weak team protection in critical moments.
key_patterns: Attacks solo 17-29km from finish after team pacing ends, extending gaps through sustained power (6 instances)
Dominates time trials but margins narrow against top GC rivals on flat courses (1sec over Thomas)
Dropped on long sustained climbs but excels on explosive steep pitches and punchy efforts (5 observations)
Deliberately surrenders jerseys/defensive duties to enable offensive freedom in breakaways (multiple Vuelta stages)
Hunts bonus seconds aggressively even when holding leads, prioritizing accumulation over conservation (4 instances)
Week-3 Grand Tour fatigue visible: couldn't convert breakaway presence, lost 27min on Tourmalet then recovered
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 ended with Lombardia crash elimination; showed vulnerability to accumulated GT fatigue and long Alpine climbs despite stage-hunting success
